job.title: Senior Tracking Data Analyst
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: Join our Data team in Montpellier as a Senior Data Analyst specialised in digital tracking. You analyse user behaviour and produce actionable insights.
mission.1: Set up and maintain the tagging plan (GTM, GA4)
mission.5: Collaborate with product and marketing teams
mission.6: Ensure quality and reliability of collected data
mission.7: Carry out ad hoc studies and analyses
profile.1: Bachelor's to Master's degree in Data, statistiques ou marketing digital
profile.2: 4 to 7 years of experience in data analytics et tracking
profile.3: Proficiency in Google Analytics 4, Google Tag Manager
profile.4: Good command of SQL and dataviz tools (Looker, Power BI)
